summary: The marker for an active Hepatitis B infection would increase is **HBsAg**, as this antigen indicates the current viral load present within the body. Other indicators such as anti-HBs may not reflect acute activity but rather past immunity or vaccination status. \boxed{\text{HBsAg}}
formatted_summary: agent1 (Round 1 summarized): The marker for an active Hepatitis B infection would increase is **HBsAg**, as this antigen indicates the current viral load present within the body. Other indicators such as anti-HBs may not reflect acute activity but rather past immunity or vaccination status. \boxed{\text{HBsAg}}. Answer choice: A
